type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Warmer and less precipitation in 2023 yielded less de-icing fluid required for aircraft.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment:
Following spraying of de-icing fluid on aircraft, the third party contractor at 
YEG vacuums as much spent fluid as they can. Recovery was not as efficient as the previous year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Release was EG being sprayed onto aircrafts for de-icing purposes and then EG vacuumed up for recycling.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: EG not disposed but rather recycled.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment:
EG is mixed and used as de-icing fluid for aircrafts. The de-icing fluid that has fallen onto the ground is then vacuumed up and recycled. 

Increase in passengers which increases number of aircraft to de-ice and therefore, more volume of de-icing fluid used.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: More activity at the airport hence more vehicles on unpaved areas of YEG.
